items.author: MarcJSpears
items.body_excerpt: The Chicago Bulls have received permission to interview Cavaliers associate head coach Johnnie Bryant for their head coach opening, a source said. The former University of Utah guard has 12 years of NBA assistant coaching experience and has also been an associate head coach with the New York Knicks.

items.title: Kendrick has reached a level only about two other longtime artists have reached on social media in terms of their bulletproof nature to any criticism. I won’t reveal those two artists for fear of being attacked but feel free to DM your guesses! 😂
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt: Kendrick has reached a level only about two other longtime artists have reached on social media in terms of their bulletproof nature to any criticism. I won’t reveal those two artists for fear of being attacked but feel free to DM your guesses! 😂

items.title: The internet is fickle and filled with frontrunners. For a while nobody online would wanna get caught saying a bad word about Kendrick, at the risk of being seen as uncool. But as time went on, you realized it provided room, space and interest for Drake to respond.
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt: The internet is fickle and filled with frontrunners. For a while nobody online would wanna get caught saying a bad word about Kendrick, at the risk of being seen as uncool. But as time went on, you realized it provided room, space and interest for Drake to respond.

items.title: Mitch on Spurs defensive collapse:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Mitch on Spurs defensive collapse:

“It just felt like it was a little bit of everything in terms of we did not put ourselves in position enough to be successful in each possession... to beat a team of this caliber in their building…we'll need to be a lot better to give yourself a chance."

items.title: Castle on how difficult it is to get Wemby going in the face of OKC’s defense:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Castle on how difficult it is to get Wemby going in the face of OKC’s defense:

“They send so many bodies towards him. It's hard at times…It’s tough, but yeah, I mean, he's our best player, so yeah, we need him to be aggressive.”
